'''âr-h-l''' ('''karahal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quinche|quinche]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-h-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quinche|quinche]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-h-l
|-
! Lemma
| karahal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirahal|thirahal]] || [[word:jirahal|jirahal]] || [[word:shirahal|shirahal]] || [[word:kirahal|kirahal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurahal|thuthurahal]] || [[word:jujurahal|jujurahal]] || [[word:shushurahal|shushurahal]] || [[word:kukurahal|kukurahal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurahal|thurahal]] || [[word:jurahal|jurahal]] || [[word:shurahal|shurahal]] || [[word:kurahal|kurahal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurahal|thurahal]] || [[word:jurahal|jurahal]] || [[word:shurahal|shurahal]] || [[word:kurahal|kurahal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therahal|therahal]] || [[word:jerahal|jerahal]] || [[word:sherahal|sherahal]] || [[word:kerahal|kerahal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorahal|thothorahal]] || [[word:jojorahal|jojorahal]] || [[word:shoshorahal|shoshorahal]] || [[word:kokorahal|kokorahal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorahal|thorahal]] || [[word:jorahal|jorahal]] || [[word:shorahal|shorahal]] || [[word:korahal|korahal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorahal|thorahal]] || [[word:jorahal|jorahal]] || [[word:shorahal|shorahal]] || [[word:korahal|korahal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrahal|thĂŠrahal]] || [[word:jĂŠrahal|jĂŠrahal]] || [[word:shĂŠrahal|shĂŠrahal]] || [[word:kĂŠrahal|kĂŠrahal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharahal|thatharahal]] || [[word:jajarahal|jajarahal]] || [[word:shasharahal|shasharahal]] || [[word:kakarahal|kakarahal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharahal|tharahal]] || [[word:jarahal|jarahal]] || [[word:sharahal|sharahal]] || [[word:karahal|karahal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharahal|tharahal]] || [[word:jarahal|jarahal]] || [[word:sharahal|sharahal]] || [[word:karahal|karahal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharahal|sharahal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharahal|gosharahal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharahal|gokisharahal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharahalnĂŒ|sharahalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharahalnknĂŒ|gosharahalnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharahalnĂŒ|gokisharahalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharahalshĂ«|sharahalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharahalnkshĂ«|gosharahalnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharahalshĂ«|gokisharahalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharahalro|sharahalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharahalnkro|gosharahalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharahalro|gokisharahalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharahalmu|sharahalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharahalnkmu|gosharahalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharahalmu|gokisharahalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharahalsher|sharahalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharahalnksher|gosharahalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharahalsher|gokisharahalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharahalng|sharahalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharahalnkng|gosharahalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharahalng|gokisharahalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharahalya|sharahalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharahalnkya|gosharahalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharahalya|gokisharahalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharahalyam|sharahalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharahalnkyam|gosharahalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharahalyam|gokisharahalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharahalnĂŒshĂ«|sharahalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharahalnknĂŒshĂ«|gosharahalnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharahalnĂŒshĂ«|gokisharahalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharahalnĂŒro|sharahalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharahalnknĂŒro|gosharahalnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharahalnĂŒro|gokisharahalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharahalnĂŒmu|sharahalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharahalnknĂŒmu|gosharahalnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharahalnĂŒmu|gokisharahalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharahalshĂ«nĂŒ|sharahalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharahalnkshĂ«nĂŒ|gosharahalnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharahalshĂ«nĂŒ|gokisharahalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharahalshĂ«ro|sharahalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharahalnkshĂ«ro|gosharahalnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharahalshĂ«ro|gokisharahalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharahalshĂ«mu|sharahalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharahalnkshĂ«mu|gosharahalnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharahalshĂ«mu|gokisharahalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharahalronĂŒ|sharahalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharahalnkronĂŒ|gosharahalnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharahalronĂŒ|gokisharahalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharahalroshĂ«|sharahalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharahalnkroshĂ«|gosharahalnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharahalroshĂ«|gokisharahalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharahalromu|sharahalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharahalnkromu|gosharahalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharahalromu|gokisharahalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharahalmunĂŒ|sharahalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharahalnkmunĂŒ|gosharahalnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharahalmunĂŒ|gokisharahalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharahalmushĂ«|sharahalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharahalnkmushĂ«|gosharahalnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharahalmushĂ«|gokisharahalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharahalmuro|sharahalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharahalnkmuro|gosharahalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharahalmuro|gokisharahalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
